purpose: Define the repository-owned template for recording that an external clinic operator executed the Operator Acceptance / Clinic Go-No-Go checklist and what decision was reached outside repository evidence.

executionRecordScope.decision: record external execution outcome for clinic go/no-go

recordSections.operatorRecord: Clinic, operator, role, review date, deployment identifier, checklist version, and environment are captured outside the repository.
recordSections.repositoryEvidence: Operator Acceptance / Clinic Go-No-Go checklist exists in repository.

recordSections.operatorRecord: Operator records whether each go criterion was executed, skipped, blocked, or delegated, with owner and reason.
recordSections.repositoryEvidence: Go criteria and no-go criteria exist in operator acceptance manifest.

recordSections.operatorRecord: Operator records go, no-go, or conditional-go decision, decision rationale, and unresolved conditions.
recordSections.repositoryEvidence: Allowed decision values are constrained by this manifest.

recordSections.operatorRecord: Clinic owner, clinical owner, compliance/legal owner, and operations owner approvals are captured outside the repository.
recordSections.repositoryEvidence: Repository explicitly does not prove external approval.

recordSections.operatorRecord: Operator confirms no patient data, secrets, credentials, signed approval artifacts, or clinic-private identifiers are committed to git.
recordSections.repositoryEvidence: Repository guard blocks secret-like and patient-data storage markers in protected files.

recordSections.operatorRecord: Conditional-go or no-go items include owner, due date, evidence location, and re-review trigger outside the repository.
recordSections.repositoryEvidence: Repository records template and next-action language only.

repositoryIntakeRules: Only redacted execution metadata may be summarized in repository memory.
Do not commit patient data, secrets, credentials, signed approval artifacts, private clinic identifiers, screenshots with PHI, or legal documents.
A go or conditional-go decision is not repository-proven unless the user provides explicit external confirmation.
A no-go decision must preserve the no-go reason and next review trigger without exposing patient or clinic-private data.
Any future numbered batch still requires a new explicit plan decision.
noGoTriggers: Any required operator checklist area remains unverified, skipped without owner approval, or blocked.
Clinic owner, clinical owner, compliance/legal owner, or operations owner signoff is missing.
Patient data, secrets, credentials, signed approval artifacts, or clinic-private identifiers would need to be committed to git.
Repository metadata is treated as medical correctness proof, legal sufficiency proof, or real go-live approval.
expectedConfirmation: Confirmed: External Clinic Operator Execution Record synced from main, no conflicts.
